Duelist Glove.name: Duelist Glove
Duelist Glove.description: A single glove worn by a legendary swordfighter who never lost a duel. The leather is supple with use, the stitching immaculate.
Duelist Glove.effect_description: Gain +10% damage per consecutive hit. Resets on miss or taking damage.

Hidden Blade.name: Hidden Blade
Hidden Blade.description: A slender blade that folds flat against the wrist. Assassins prize it not for its size, but for the moment of surprise it creates.
Hidden Blade.effect_description: +10% damage per negative status on the target.

Woodcutter's Bandana.name: Woodcutter's Bandana
Woodcutter's Bandana.description: A faded cloth worn by a lumberjack who survived a widow-maker falling across his neck. He swore the bandana saved his life.
Woodcutter's Bandana.effect_description: Once per battle, a killing blow instead leaves you at 1 HP.

Resonant Badge.name: Resonant Badge
Resonant Badge.description: A small pin that hums faintly when held near a casting hand. Enchanted to harmonize with elemental energy.
Resonant Badge.effect_description: +25% damage when attacking with your current Element.

Rainbow Apple.name: Rainbow Apple
Rainbow Apple.description: An apple that never rots and never loses its color. Each bite tastes like a different fruit.

Medicine Pouch.name: Medicine Pouch
Medicine Pouch.description: A well-worn pouch filled with herbs, salves, and bandages. Someone trusted kept it close for a long time.

Prayer Bead.name: Prayer Bead
Prayer Bead.description: A single bead from a broken devotional string. It feels warm to the touch.
Prayer Bead.effect_description: Recover 1 MP at the start of each turn. Stacks with additional beads.

Lifespark Crystal.name: Lifespark Crystal
Lifespark Crystal.description: A crystal that pulses faintly, like a heartbeat. The warmth inside it is almost alive.
Lifespark Crystal.effect_description: Shatters automatically when the bearer falls, reviving them with 50% HP. Each crystal grants one revival.

Eyeglasses.name: Eyeglasses
Eyeglasses.description: Thin wire frames holding lenses of extraordinary clarity. Whoever made them ground the glass by hand.

Fireproof Cloth.name: Fireproof Cloth
Fireproof Cloth.description: A swatch of dense grey fabric, treated by someone who knew what they were doing. Still carries a faint smell of ash from whenever it was last tested. Doesn't catch, doesn't smoulder.

Leather Boots.name: Leather Boots
Leather Boots.description: A pair of well-broken-in boots with thick soles and room to breathe. They've walked many roads.

Witch Hat.name: Witch Hat
Witch Hat.description: A tall, wide-brimmed hat with a slight lean to the left. Still smells faintly of ink and dried flowers.

Chainmail.name: Chainmail
Chainmail.description: Hundreds of hand-linked rings of steel, worn smooth by years of use. Heavier than it looks.

Gorgon Eye.name: Gorgon Eye
Gorgon Eye.description: A preserved eye from a gorgon, still holding its petrifying gaze. Don't look directly into it.
Gorgon Eye.effect_description: At the start of battle, automatically cast Gorgon Eye on a random enemy.

Backpack.name: Backpack
Backpack.description: A canvas pack with reinforced straps and a surprising number of pockets. Seems to fit more than it should.
Backpack.effect_description: After each battle, scavenge a random item.

Funny Bone.name: Funny Bone
Funny Bone.description: Said to be carved from the finger of a jester executed for a joke that nobody laughed at. It makes a hollow clicking sound when you shake it.
Funny Bone.effect_description: A carved finger bone that rattles when struck. Its vibrations unsettle those who dare to hit you.

Black Skull.name: Black Skull
Black Skull.description: No one knows what creature it came from. The carvings on its base match no known script, and it is always slightly colder than the air around it.
Black Skull.effect_description: An obsidian skull that drinks in the life force of whatever you strike. Smooth, cold, and hungry.

Troll Amulet.name: Troll Amulet
Troll Amulet.description: A disc of rough-carved basalt on a braided cord, worn smooth from years of daily handling. The mark on its face is old Troll script.
Troll Amulet.effect_description: Recover 5% of max HP at the start of each turn.

Amber Drop.name: Amber Drop
Amber Drop.description: A lump of amber the size of a fist, warm to the touch even underground. Whatever is inside it — legs, wings, something with too many parts — is still perfectly preserved. Somehow, so is everything around it.
Amber Drop.effect_description: Negative statuses on you expire 1 turn sooner.

Brilliant Ruby.name: Brilliant Ruby
Brilliant Ruby.description: A ruby the size of a thumb, mined deep in the Core Cavern where the walls still radiate heat. Something burns inside it that hasn't gone out in centuries — not a reflection, not a trick of the light.
Brilliant Ruby.effect_description: You begin battle as the Fire element.

Obsidian Chunk.name: Obsidian Chunk
Obsidian Chunk.description: A blocky piece of volcanic glass with one edge that formed clean — no knapping needed. The Lizals of the Core Cavern say obsidian only cuts perfectly once, on the break. After that, you're just chipping.

Sparkling Sapphire.name: Sparkling Sapphire
Sparkling Sapphire.description: A deep blue crystal pulled from an underground stream in the Lost Swamp, still faintly damp. The color shifts with the angle — darker near the base, almost clear at the tip.
Sparkling Sapphire.effect_description: You begin battle as the Water element.

Tough Topaz.name: Tough Topaz
Tough Topaz.description: A heavy golden stone with inclusions that catch the light like veins in rock. Miners who've carried one for long days say the weight feels like it belongs there.
Tough Topaz.effect_description: You begin battle as the Earth element.

Luminous Diamond.name: Luminous Diamond
Luminous Diamond.description: A raw diamond still attached to matrix rock, uncut and unremarkable except for the way it catches light and breaks it into everything at once.
Luminous Diamond.effect_description: You begin battle as the Light element.

Abyssal Onyx.name: Abyssal Onyx
Abyssal Onyx.description: A smooth black stone with no grain, no texture, no reflection. It absorbs the light around it the way silence absorbs sound — not by blocking it, but by making it disappear.
Abyssal Onyx.effect_description: You begin battle as the Dark element.

Verdant Emerald.name: Verdant Emerald
Verdant Emerald.description: A hexagonal crystal the color of deep forest canopy, found in the upper reaches of Apple Woods where the roots break through the cave ceiling.
Verdant Emerald.effect_description: You begin battle as the Wind element.

Old Boot.name: Old Boot
Old Boot.description: A waterlogged boot, found at the end of your line instead of anything useful. Still structurally intact, if you squint. Smells like the wet fur.
Old Boot.effect_description: Agility +1. It is still a boot.

Crumbled Epitaph.name: Crumbled Epitaph
Crumbled Epitaph.description: A fragment of headstone. The inscription ends mid-sentence: '...AND HE DID NOT —'. The rest is gone.
Crumbled Epitaph.effect_description: Gain +4 DEF when HP falls below 50%.

Tally Stone.name: Tally Stone
Tally Stone.description: A smooth river stone covered in scratched tally marks — hundreds of them, all the way to the edge. Someone used this to count... something. Probably.
Tally Stone.effect_description: Gain +3% damage per turn in combat. Stacks accumulate throughout battle.

Ferryman's Obol.name: Ferryman's Obol
Ferryman's Obol.description: An ancient coin, heavier than it should be. Both faces worn to a faint impression of a boat. Used in burial customs of centuries past.

River King's Whisker.name: River King's Whisker
River King's Whisker.description: A stiff, wire-like whisker from the largest catfish anyone in Apple Woods has ever seen. It smells faintly of the river, even after days.

Necromancer Cloak.name: Necromancer Cloak
Necromancer Cloak.description: A tattered robe saturated with death-magic. Its protective enchantments grow stronger in the presence of the undead, drawn from the collective animus of nearby thralls.
Necromancer Cloak.effect_description: Reduces damage taken by 60% while other enemies remain in battle.

Pegasus Feather.name: Pegasus Feather
Pegasus Feather.description: A large primary feather from a wild mountain pegasus. Impossibly light, faintly iridescent. Still carries the cold of the high peaks.

Badge of Valor.name: Badge of Valor
Badge of Valor.description: A small bronze pin shaped like a shield, pressed into your hand by a woman made of lake water. It's warm. That's probably fine.
Badge of Valor.effect_description: Gain +4 STR and +3 AGI when HP falls below 50%.
